introSection: Big Air is a shuttle roller coaster located at E-DA Theme Park in Dashu Township, Kaohsiung, Taiwan. Opened in 2010, it is the only Big Air installation from Vekoma.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Big Air was built as a spinning roller coaster, but the spinning function has not been seen in operation since 2011 and is presumed to have been disabled.

fullText:
Big Air is a shuttle roller coaster located at E-DA Theme Park in Dashu Township, Kaohsiung, Taiwan. Opened in 2010, it is the only Big Air installation from Vekoma.

Big Air was built as a spinning roller coaster, but the spinning function has not been seen in operation since 2011 and is presumed to have been disabled.
